source: Exercise 5: Find ONE word or phrase from the passage
question: A school trip for learning
passage: Last weekend, our class went on a field trip to a tropical rainforest. We followed a nature trail and explored different parts of the forest. Along the way, we saw a wide variety of wildlife, including birds, frogs and insects. Our teacher explained the importance of conservation and how human activities can affect the environment. She encouraged us to reduce waste, reuse materials and recycle whenever possible. In the afternoon, we worked in groups to complete a survey about the environment. We wrote our ideas on clipboards and shared them with the class. It was not only an interesting trip but also a meaningful learning experience.
